These packages are brought to you by one of the best domestic tour operators in India, trusted by thousands of satisfied travelers.

This article is brought to you by TravelXploria – a travel planning company with over 12 years of experience in organizing customized Andaman tour packages for Indian travelers from cities like Delhi, Pune, Hyderabad, and Chennai. We are proud to be recognized as a best tour and travel company in India, with a growing base of clients looking for dependable services from a travel agency in Kolkata near me and other major cities.

Why Choose Andaman for Your Next Vacation?

Pristine Beaches and Crystal-Clear Waters

The Andaman Islands are home to some of the world’s most breathtaking beaches like Radhanagar and Elephant Beach. Their turquoise waters and soft white sands make them ideal for sunbathing, swimming, and unwinding in paradise.

💡 Insider Tip: Visit Radhanagar Beach between 8–10 AM to enjoy crowd-free walks and better lighting for photos. It’s rated one of Asia’s top beaches by Time magazine.

Rich Marine Life and Coral Reefs
Snorkeling and scuba diving in Andaman open up a vibrant underwater world filled with colorful coral reefs and exotic marine life. No matter your skill level, there's an underwater adventure waiting for you.
You can book government-certified diving sessions via the Andaman Tourism official website for safety and affordability.

Ideal for Honeymooners, Families, and Solo Travelers
From romantic beach walks for couples to child-friendly sightseeing and activities, Andaman offers something for everyone. Our budget-friendly Andaman tour packages for families ensure comfort without breaking the bank. We also offer exclusive honeymoon packages from Kolkata and other metro cities designed for newlyweds seeking a balance of privacy, adventure, and affordability.

Places to Visit in Andaman Tour Packages​

Port Blair – The Gateway to Andaman
Home to the historic Cellular Jail, light and sound shows, and local markets. Most affordable tour packages for Andaman islands begin here.
Don’t miss the local seafood joints near Aberdeen Bazaar for authentic island cuisine.

Havelock Island – Home to Radhanagar Beach
This island offers crystal-clear waters and is the centerpiece of our best tour packages for Andaman.
You can also enjoy scuba diving and beachside candlelight dinners, especially with honeymoon-focused packages.

Neil Island – Tranquil Beaches and Natural Bridges
Relax on secluded beaches and witness coral bridges. A must-visit in all Andaman family tour packages.

Adventurous? Add Baratang’s surreal caves and mud volcanoes to your Andaman tour package from Kolkata or Hyderabad.

packages.overview: Over six unforgettable days, you’ll land in Port Blair and dive straight into history with a guided tour of the Cellular Jail followed by the evocative Light & Sound Show, then drift into island time as you stroll Corbyn’s Cove at sunset. On day two, catch an early ferry to Havelock Island, settle into your beachfront cottage, and spend the afternoon lazing on powdery Radhanagar Beach before sipping coconut water as the sky blushes at dusk. Day three brings underwater thrills—choose between snorkeling or scuba diving off Elephant Beach’s coral fringes—then unwind amid the ebony boulders of Kalapathar Beach. Midweek, you’ll ferry to tranquil Neil Island for two nights of serene exploration: cycle to the Natural Bridge, swim in Bharatpur’s clear shallows, and toast a pastel sunset at Laxmanpur Point. On day five, return to Port Blair to wander the ruins of Ross Island’s colonial relics and hunt handcrafted souvenirs at Sagarika Market. Finally, after a leisurely breakfast by the sea or one last dip at Corbyn’s Cove, you’ll be transferred to the airport, suitcase full of memories and a camera brimming with island magic

packages.overview: With Travelxploria, from the moment you touch down in Port Blair, you’ll feel the island breeze as you unwind on the palm-fringed Corbyn’s Cove Beach and later witness the evocative Light & Sound Show at the historic Cellular Jail. A scenic cruise arranged by Travelxploria whisks you to Havelock Island, where you’ll lounge on the powdery sands of Radhanagar Beach until the sky blushes at sunset, then hop aboard a boat for complimentary snorkeling amid the coral gardens of Elephant Beach—complete with seamless hotel pickup and drop-off. Before you know it, you’re marveling at the ebony boulders and crystal waters of Kalapathar Beach, then gliding back to Port Blair by cruise, your hotel waiting to welcome you one last time. packages.overview:
​Here’s your streamlined Andaman journey with Travelxploria:

Arrival at Port Blair – Touch down and drift straight to Corbyn’s Cove Beach for a breezy welcome, then experience the evocative Light & Sound Show at the historic Cellular Jail.

Cruise to Havelock Island – Glide over azure waters to Havelock, then unwind on Radhanagar Beach and watch the sunset paint the sky.

Explore Kalapathar Beach & Return – Wander among the ebony boulders and crystal shallows of Kalapathar, then hop back on your cruise to Port Blair for a smooth hotel drop.

Departure – After a fond farewell to the islands, Travelxploria ensures your timely transfer to the airport—leaving you with sweet memories and sandy footprints.

packages.overview: ​With Travelxploria, your Andaman adventure begins the moment you step off the plane with a seamless airport pickup, whisking you straight to the palm-fringed shores of Corbyn’s Cove Beach before transporting you into history at the Cellular Jail’s mesmerizing Light and Sound Show. The next morning, embark on our exclusive Ross and North Bay Island boat-ride tour, brimming with opportunities to spot vibrant marine life and snap postcard-perfect views. Then, aboard a luxury cruise to Havelock Island, you’ll discover the ebony boulders of Kalapathar Beach and unwind on the powdery sands of Radhanagar Beach as the sun melts into the horizon. Adventure continues with a thrilling boat ride to Elephant Beach—complete with complimentary snorkeling among kaleidoscopic coral gardens—before cruising on to Neil Island for a soul-stirring sunset at Laxmanpur Beach. Explore the iconic Natural Rock Formation and the tranquil shallows of Bharatpur Beach, then glide back to Port Blair by cruise for a final hotel drop. At journey’s end, Travelxploria ensures your departure is as smooth as your arrival, leaving you with sandy toes, sun-kissed memories, and stories to last a lifetime.

packages.package_name: Andaman Bliss: A Perfect Island Retreat
packages.overview: With Travelxploria, your Andaman odyssey begins the moment you touch down in Port Blair—after a seamless airport pickup, lose yourself in the palm-fringed serenity of Corbyn’s Cove Beach before stepping back in time at the Cellular Jail’s moving Light & Sound Show. Next, embark on our signature Ross Island and North Bay tour, where colonial ruins meet vibrant coral gardens. A luxury cruise whisks you to Havelock Island for sun-drenched hours on the world-renowned Radhanagar Beach, followed by complimentary snorkeling in Elephant Beach’s crystal shallows. On Neil Island, thrill to water sports at Bharatpur Beach and marvel at Laxmanpur’s fiery sunset, then discover the majestic Howrah Bridge rock formation en route back to Port Blair. Adventure peaks with an early-morning Baratang Island excursion—wind through the Jarawa Reserve to the haunting Limestone Caves—before Travelxploria delivers you to the airport, suitcase full of souvenirs and heart brimming with island magic.

After completing the tour, our Travelxploria representative will ensure your safe return to the hotel. Stay overnight in Port Blair.

packages.package_name: Pearls of the East: Andaman Sojourn
packages.overview: ​With Travelxploria, your Andaman adventure begins the moment you arrive in Port Blair, where you’ll feel the ocean breeze at Corbyn’s Cove Beach before stepping back in time at the Cellular Jail’s evocative Light & Sound Show. Next, set off on our exclusive Ross Island and North Bay Island excursion, exploring colonial-era ruins and snorkeling amid vibrant coral gardens. A scenic cruise then delivers you to Havelock Island, where the powdery sands of Radhanagar Beach invite you to unwind, followed by an exhilarating boat ride to Elephant Beach—complete with complimentary snorkeling in crystal-clear waters. Continuing your island hop, you’ll glide to Neil Island to bask on Bharatpur Beach’s shores and toast a pastel sunset at Laxmanpur Beach. Before returning to Port Blair, discover the majestic rock arches of Howrah Bridge, then cruise back for one last stroll through the island’s laid-back streets. Finally, Travelxploria ensures a smooth transfer to the airport, leaving you with sun-kissed memories and the promise to return.

As the evening sets in, experience the captivating Light & Sound Show at Cellular Jail, where the best on-ground support staff of Travelxploria will ensure you have a hassle-free experience while witnessing the heroic saga of India’s independence come alive.

After an enriching day, you will be dropped back at your hotel for a comfortable overnight stay in Port Blair.

The next morning, a scenic ferry whisks you to Havelock Island, where the world-famous Radhanagar Beach invites you to lounge under swaying palms, followed by a vibrant boat ride to Elephant Beach with complimentary snorkeling among kaleidoscopic coral gardens. packages.overview: From the moment you touch down in Port Blair with Travelxploria, you’ll be swept into the laid-back rhythm of island life: stroll along the swaying palms of Corbyn’s Cove Beach by day and watch history come alive under the stars at the Cellular Jail’s Light and Sound Show by night. The next morning, Travelxploria’s curated cruise whisks you to Havelock Island, where Radhanagar Beach unfurls its powder-white sands as you linger until sunset’s golden glow fades. Day three brings an adrenaline-charged snorkeling excursion at Elephant Beach—explore vibrant coral gardens teeming with tropical fish before returning by speedboat. On day four, sail on to Neil Island and find yourself spellbound by Laxmanpur Beach’s fiery horizon at dusk. Day five is yours to roam among the Natural Rock Formation and the tranquil shores of Bharatpur Beach before you drift back to Port Blair. Then, step back into the Andamans’ colonial past on Ross Island and dive into thrilling water sports off North Bay Island on day six. Finally, with your heart full of sunlit memories and your camera brimming with snapshots of turquoise seas and verdant landscapes, Travelxploria ensures your airport drop-off is seamless—leaving you already dreaming of your next escape to these island paradises.

You will be escorted to your hotel by our best on-ground support staff of Travelxploria, where you can rest and relax. The coastal drive to this beach is breathtaking, with a stretch of around 4 km offering stunning views of the open sea on your left—an experience to cherish. Take pit stops along the way to capture beautiful moments and immerse yourself in the scenic beauty.

Afterward, proceed to the enthralling Sound and Light Show at Cellular Jail, where the heroic saga of India’s freedom struggle comes alive. Witness the powerful enactment of freedom fighters’ sacrifices and their relentless fight for independence. Post completion of this immersive experience, our Travelxploria representative will drop you back at your hotel for a comfortable overnight stay.

Let’s step back in time as our representative of Travelxploria, along with our experienced tour guide of Travelxploria and the best on-ground support staff of Travelxploria, takes you to Ross Island, the first administrative settlement of the British in the Andaman Islands. Once known as the \"Paris of the Past,\" this island still holds the fascinating ruins of the luxurious lifestyle enjoyed by the British during that era. Wander through the remnants of this historic site and soak in its rich colonial past.

From Ross Island, we continue our journey by boat to North Bay Island, the famed Coral Island of Port Blair. Blessed with an abundance of rich marine life, North Bay Island is one of the most sought-after destinations in Andaman. Here, you can dive into adventure with Scuba Diving, Sea Walk, Snorkeling, and a thrilling Glass Bottom Boat Ride, offering you a mesmerizing view of the vibrant underwater world.

After a day filled with exploration and adventure, our Travelxploria team ensures a smooth return, allowing you to relax and unwind after an unforgettable experience.

Upon arrival, our Travelxploria representative will assist you in settling in and enjoying the pristine surroundings. Take a moment to relax on the soft sands and soak in the breathtaking coastal beauty.

Next, our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria will lead you to an exciting complimentary snorkeling session, where you get to witness the vibrant marine life up close (subject to association guidelines). Dive into the crystal-clear waters and experience the mesmerizing underwater world like never before!

After this thrilling experience, we board our boat and return to Havelock dock, where our best on-ground support staff from Travelxploria will be waiting to assist you with a seamless transfer back to your hotel. Spend the rest of the day unwinding and reflecting on the incredible moments from your snorkeling adventure.

packages.package_name: Andaman Sea & Sand Tour – Island Hopping
packages.overview: With Travelxploria, your Andaman adventure begins the moment you step off the plane in Port Blair—feel the soft breeze at Corbyn’s Cove Beach by day and, as dusk falls, watch history illuminate the night sky at the Cellular Jail’s Light and Sound Show. The next morning, glide across glittering waters on a private cruise to Havelock Island, where the world-famous Radhanagar Beach beckons you to sink your toes into its ivory sands and bask in a breathtaking sunset. On day three, set sail for the vibrant coral gardens of Elephant Beach—enjoy a leisurely boat ride and complimentary snorkeling as kaleidoscopic fish dance around you. Then, on day four, discover the dramatic black boulders and serene shoreline of Kalapathar Beach before drifting back to Port Blair in style. Finally, Travelxploria ensures a seamless airport transfer as you depart with your heart full of sunlit memories and a promise to return to these island paradises.

overview:
Best Tour Packages for Andaman – Explore the Paradise Islands of India

Looking for the Best Tour Packages For Andaman? You’ve come to the right place. Whether you're planning a romantic getaway, a family vacation, or a solo adventure, Andaman and Nicobar Islands offer everything from pristine beaches to rich marine biodiversity. Our expertly curated Andaman family tour packages and best Andaman honeymoon packages on a budget are designed to fit every traveler's needs. These packages are brought to you by one of the best domestic tour operators in India, trusted by thousands of satisfied travelers.

This article is brought to you by TravelXploria – a travel planning company with over 12 years of experience in organizing customized Andaman tour packages for Indian travelers from cities like Delhi, Pune, Hyderabad, and Chennai. We are proud to be recognized as a best tour and travel company in India, with a growing base of clients looking for dependable services from a travel agency in Kolkata near me and other major cities.

Why Choose Andaman for Your Next Vacation?

Pristine Beaches and Crystal-Clear Waters

The Andaman Islands are home to some of the world’s most breathtaking beaches like Radhanagar and Elephant Beach. Their turquoise waters and soft white sands make them ideal for sunbathing, swimming, and unwinding in paradise.

💡 Insider Tip: Visit Radhanagar Beach between 8–10 AM to enjoy crowd-free walks and better lighting for photos. It’s rated one of Asia’s top beaches by Time magazine.

Rich Marine Life and Coral Reefs
Snorkeling and scuba diving in Andaman open up a vibrant underwater world filled with colorful coral reefs and exotic marine life. No matter your skill level, there's an underwater adventure waiting for you.
You can book government-certified diving sessions via the Andaman Tourism official website for safety and affordability.

Ideal for Honeymooners, Families, and Solo Travelers
From romantic beach walks for couples to child-friendly sightseeing and activities, Andaman offers something for everyone. Our budget-friendly Andaman tour packages for families ensure comfort without breaking the bank. We also offer exclusive honeymoon packages from Kolkata and other metro cities designed for newlyweds seeking a balance of privacy, adventure, and affordability.

Top-Rated Andaman Tour Packages to Consider

5 Days Andaman Tour Package – Perfect for First-Time Visitors
This is an ideal short escape covering major attractions in Port Blair and Havelock Island. It's one of the affordable tour packages for Andaman islands best suited for those on a tight schedule.
Packages typically include airport pick-up, 3-star stays, ferry transfers, and sightseeing to Cellular Jail, Corbyn’s Cove, and Radhanagar Beach.

7 Days Andaman Honeymoon Package – Romantic Escapes
Explore secluded islands and enjoy candlelight dinners under the stars. Our best Andaman honeymoon packages on a budget make romantic luxury possible even on a tight budget. These are designed by the best tours and travel agency in India for maximum value.

Customizable Family Tour Packages to Andaman
Our Andaman family tour packages include fun and safe experiences like glass-bottom boat rides and light-and-sound shows at the Cellular Jail.

Tour Package for Andaman and Nicobar Islands from Delhi
Planning a tour package for Andaman and Nicobar Islands from Delhi? We offer direct flight options, smooth transfers, and personalized itineraries. Whether you're looking for adventure, relaxation, or history, we’ve got you covered.
Looking for flexibility? Our Andaman tour package from Delhi options include weekend escapes and extended vacations.
Traveling with family? Our budget-friendly Andaman tour packages for families are perfect for school holidays or long weekends.
💡 Travel Tip: Midweek flights from Delhi to Port Blair are often 15–20% cheaper—aim for Tuesday or Wednesday departures.

Additional City-Specific Packages:
​
1.Andaman tour package from Kolkata – Includes flight + hotel + sightseeing. Often cheaper and with shorter flight times. Also ideal if you’re browsing from a travel agency in Kolkata near me for trusted local options.
2. Andaman tour package from Chennai – Ideal for a quick beach escape with several budget airlines operating daily.
3.Andaman and Nicobar tour packages from Hyderabad – Direct flights make it convenient for families and honeymooners alike.
4.Andaman and Nicobar tour packages from Pune – Great for groups, with multi-island itineraries and water sports included.
5.Andaman tour packages from Mumbai – Enjoy coastal-to-coastal travel experiences with early bookings.
6.Andaman tour packages from Pune – Family-oriented packages with flexible check-in/check-out options.

Places to Visit in Andaman Tour Packages​

Port Blair – The Gateway to Andaman
Home to the historic Cellular Jail, light and sound shows, and local markets. Most affordable tour packages for Andaman islands begin here.
Don’t miss the local seafood joints near Aberdeen Bazaar for authentic island cuisine.

Havelock Island – Home to Radhanagar Beach
This island offers crystal-clear waters and is the centerpiece of our best tour packages for Andaman.
You can also enjoy scuba diving and beachside candlelight dinners, especially with honeymoon-focused packages.

Neil Island – Tranquil Beaches and Natural Bridges
Relax on secluded beaches and witness coral bridges. A must-visit in all Andaman family tour packages.
Great for nature photography and calm beach picnics.

Baratang Island – Limestone Caves and Mud Volcanoes
Adventurous? Add Baratang’s surreal caves and mud volcanoes to your Andaman tour package from Kolkata or Hyderabad.
The boat ride through mangrove forests is a highlight! Go early to beat the crowds.

Inclusions in the Best Andaman Tour Packages

Hotel Stay and Daily Breakfast
Handpicked 3-star, 4-star, and luxury properties included.
Our hotel partners are vetted for safety, cleanliness, and family-friendliness.

Airport Transfers and Ferry Tickets
Smooth inter-island connections are a part of every Andaman tour package from Chennai or any major city.

Sightseeing Tours and Adventure Activities
Snorkeling, scuba diving, kayaking, and more are part of both family and honeymoon packages.
We also offer optional upgrades for private guides, candlelight setups, or scuba certification courses.

Best Time to Book Tour Packages for Andaman
Seasonal Highlights – Summer, Monsoon, and Winter Travel Tips

Winter (October to March) – Best time to visit
Summer (April to June) – Great for water activities
Monsoon (July to September) – Budget travelers can find great deals

Some resorts offer 25% off in the monsoon. Ideal for travelers seeking peace and lower prices.

When to Book for Lowest Prices and Fewer Crowds
Book your tour package for Andaman and Nicobar Islands from Delhi or other cities during the shoulder months (April or September) for discounts on budget-friendly Andaman tour packages for families.

Frequently Asked Questions About Andaman Tour Packages

Is a passport required to visit Andaman from India?
No, Indian citizens do not need a passport to travel to the Andaman Islands.

What is the ideal duration for an Andaman trip?
5 to 7 days is ideal for a relaxed yet complete experience. Whether you're choosing a tour package for Andaman and Nicobar Islands from Delhi or Hyderabad, this duration covers key highlights.

Are Andaman packages suitable for elderly travelers or children?
Absolutely. Our Andaman family tour packages are designed with all age groups in mind, ensuring comfort and safety.

What are the best Andaman honeymoon packages on a budget?
We offer 5 to 7-day packages with beachfront stays, candlelight dinners, and private island tours at affordable prices. Many include special honeymoon arrangements at no extra cost. For couples seeking romantic beach vacations, our honeymoon packages from Kolkata remain popular.

Which are the most budget-friendly Andaman tour packages for families?
Packages from cities like Pune, Chennai, and Mumbai often include discounts for groups, kids, and extended stays. These budget-friendly Andaman tour packages for families also feature kid-friendly meals and safer transport options.

Are there affordable tour packages for Andaman islands from metro cities?
Yes, we have affordable tour packages for Andaman islands from Delhi, Kolkata, Hyderabad, Pune, and Mumbai with price-matching options and group discounts.

Book the Best Andaman Tour Package Today

Get Expert Help from Trusted Travel Advisors
Whether you're booking from Delhi or Pune, our advisors ensure you get the Best Tour Packages For Andaman suited to your needs and budget.
We assist with last-minute bookings, customized itineraries, and 24/7 on-trip support—backed by the best tour and travel company in India.

Custom Plans for Couples, Families, and Groups
We specialize in Andaman tour packages from Mumbai, Pune, and Chennai with custom itineraries and group discounts. Trust TravelXploria—recognized as a best tour and travel company—to craft your perfect island escape.
